history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young Asian male with short, dark hair, wearing a black t-shirt and black pants, is energetically playing a drum set in a recording studio. His arms are blurred with motion as he strikes the cymbals and drums with drumsticks. The drum set is black with silver hardware, featuring a large bass drum in the foreground, a snare drum, and several cymbals, including one labeled "NEBULAE." The studio has red, acoustically treated walls. On the back wall, a triptych logo is mounted, featuring the word "Era" in a stylized font with "STUDIO" underneath, set against a background of blue and white light bursts. Two large black speakers with yellow "Hz" logos are positioned on either side of the drum set, flanking the scene. The lighting appears to be from overhead studio lights, creating a somewhat dramatic and focused atmosphere, with shadows cast on the floor. The overall mood is one of focused energy and musical practice in a professional yet intimate setting. The color palette is dominated by the deep red of the walls, the black of the drums and speakers, and the metallic tones of the cymbals and hardware, with the logo providing a contrasting splash of blue and white.
